message:
fix(sync,decoding): clear waiter_id on cancel + validate zero symbol_size

Two bugs fixed:

1. OwnedAcquireFuture::poll() cancellation path did not clear waiter_id,
   causing Drop to redundantly re-acquire the lock and attempt removal of
   an already-removed waiter. The borrowed AcquireFuture already had this
   fix (line 254); this aligns OwnedAcquireFuture with the same pattern.

2. plan_blocks() in decoding.rs panics on div_ceil(0) if symbol_size is
   zero. The encoding side already validates this (encoding.rs:205), but
   the decoding side accepted zero from untrusted metadata. Now returns
   DecodingError::InconsistentMetadata instead of panicking.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
